VORFALE_TWEAKS.plain-chat-input.name: Plain Chat Input
VORFALE_TWEAKS.plain-chat-input.hint: Disable automatic markdown-style formatting shortcuts in the chat input.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.plain-chat-input.descript: Keeps Foundry's v14 chat editor but disables chat input rules such as dash-to-list, numbered lists, headings, blockquotes, code blocks, horizontal rules, and double-dash replacement.
